description: Plugin-distributed hooks for search-relevance-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags search anti-patterns (vector-only without lexical consideration, hardcoded chunk size, relevance claim without metrics, reranker without recall note). Set SEARCH_RE_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
